caption: The video features a man performing in front of an audience, likely in a classroom or small auditorium setting. He is wearing glasses, a white shirt with a distinctive red and black design on the chest, and a black vest adorned with blue floral embroidery. The man is playing an acoustic guitar and singing into a microphone, suggesting he is giving a musical performance or presentation. The background consists of wooden blinds, and the heads of several children are visible in the foreground, indicating that the audience is composed of young students. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner, possibly indicating the name of the organization or event. The man appears to be deeply engaged in his performance, moving his hand rhythmically as he plays the guitar.
